title: term package
description: An import for all major terms

lore.title: Sheikha
lore.body: A woman who holds religious, social, and often absolute authority within the matriarchal order.

lore.title: Matriarch
lore.body: An elder woman who holds senior authority and may govern households, institutions, or wider communities.

lore.title: Mother
lore.body: A woman recognized as a source of origin, care, and maternal authority.

lore.title: Son
lore.body: A male child or male descendant defined in relation to maternal lineage and authority.

lore.title: Majlis
lore.body: A formal council where authority is exercised and decisions are made.

lore.title: Majlis al-Ummahat al-Kubrā
lore.body: The supreme council of matriarchs that defines doctrine and governs the entire system.

lore.title: Wilaya
lore.body: A governed region defined by jurisdiction, authority, and doctrinal enforcement.

lore.title: Order
lore.body: A structured group organized around a shared function, discipline, or doctrine.

lore.title: Ummah
lore.body: A collective bound by shared doctrine and submission to the matriarchal system.

lore.title: Subject
lore.body: An individual living under the authority of the system.

lore.title: Disciple
lore.body: A person undergoing guidance, discipline, or instruction under a Sheikha.

lore.title: Witness
lore.body: An individual assigned to observe or validate an act, ritual, or event.

lore.title: Custodian
lore.body: A person responsible for maintaining, enforcing, or preserving a system or space.

lore.title: Bearer
lore.body: An individual designated to carry a function, role, or symbolic responsibility.

lore.title: Doctrine
lore.body: A system of beliefs, laws, and teachings that governs the world.

lore.title: Fitrah
lore.body: The defined natural state of a being as established by doctrine.

lore.title: Correction
lore.body: The process of enforcing alignment with doctrine.

lore.title: Deviation
lore.body: A state of misalignment from doctrine.

lore.title: Purification
lore.body: The process of removing deviation and restoring alignment.

lore.title: Alignment
lore.body: A state of full conformity with doctrine.

lore.title: Submission
lore.body: The internal acceptance of authority beyond physical compliance.

lore.title: Obedience
lore.body: The act of following commands issued by authority.

lore.title: Ritual
lore.body: A prescribed act performed according to doctrine.

lore.title: Rite
lore.body: A formalized ritual marking a transition, status, or function.

lore.title: Invocation
lore.body: A spoken or enacted act that initiates a ritual or authority.

lore.title: Seal
lore.body: An act or mechanism that restricts, binds, or finalizes a state.

lore.title: Binding
lore.body: The act of imposing restriction or obligation through doctrine.

lore.title: Offering
lore.body: An act of giving performed within a ritual context.

lore.title: Recitation
lore.body: The formal repetition of words with doctrinal significance.

lore.title: Sanctum
lore.body: A controlled or sacred space where doctrine is enacted.

lore.title: Chamber
lore.body: An enclosed space designated for a specific function or ritual.

lore.title: Hall
lore.body: A large formal space used for gatherings or ceremonies.

lore.title: Domain
lore.body: A space under the control of a specific authority.

lore.title: Threshold
lore.body: A boundary marking entry into a different state or space.

lore.title: Chastity
lore.body: A controlled state of restriction imposed on the body.

lore.title: Restraint
lore.body: The limitation of movement, action, or function.

lore.title: Discipline
lore.body: The enforcement of order through control and correction.

lore.title: State
lore.body: A defined condition of body, mind, or status.

lore.title: Conditioning
lore.body: The process of shaping behavior through repetition and control.

lore.title: Term
lore.body: A word or expression with a defined meaning in the system.

lore.title: Designation
lore.body: An assigned name, role, or status.

lore.title: Inscription
lore.body: Written or engraved content with formal significance.

lore.title: Record
lore.body: A preserved account of events, rulings, or individuals.

lore.title: Archive
lore.body: A structured collection of records and knowledge.

lore.title: Artifact
lore.body: A physical object or document with significance.

lore.title: Relic
lore.body: An artifact preserved for its historical or symbolic value.

lore.title: Text
lore.body: A written work containing doctrine, rulings, or knowledge.

lore.title: Scroll
lore.body: A physical document used for formal or sacred writing.

lore.title: Event
lore.body: A defined occurrence in time.

lore.title: Ceremony
lore.body: A formal event structured by ritual.

lore.title: Procession
lore.body: A structured movement of individuals as part of a ritual or event.

lore.title: Judgment
lore.body: An official decision issued by authority.

lore.title: Decree
lore.body: A binding command issued by a Sheikha or council.

lore.title: Command
lore.body: An instruction issued by authority.

lore.title: Enforcement
lore.body: The act of ensuring obedience to doctrine or command.

lore.title: Authorization
lore.body: The granting of permission or legitimacy.

lore.title: Sanction
lore.body: An imposed consequence for deviation.

lore.title: Breast
lore.body: A female organ recognized as a source of nourishment, authority, and symbolic power within doctrine.

lore.title: Womb
lore.body: The organ of gestation, regarded as the primary locus of creation, authority, and continuity.

lore.title: Milk
lore.body: A substance produced by the breast, treated as nourishment and as a medium of symbolic transmission.

lore.title: Flesh
lore.body: The physical body as an object of control, discipline, and doctrinal interpretation.

lore.title: Seed
lore.body: The male reproductive element, considered functionally subordinate within the system.

lore.title: Body
lore.body: The physical form of an individual as defined, regulated, and interpreted by doctrine.

lore.title: Trace
lore.body: A measurable imprint or residue left by an act, presence, or interaction.

lore.title: Imprint
lore.body: A lasting effect produced on the body or state through ritual, contact, or authority.

lore.title: Mark
lore.body: A visible or defined sign indicating status, event, or transformation.

lore.title: State of Being
lore.body: A defined condition of existence as recognized by doctrine.

lore.title: Function
lore.body: The assigned purpose of a body, role, or element within the system.

lore.title: Designation of Function
lore.body: The formal assignment of a specific role or purpose.

lore.title: Fatwa
lore.body: A formal ruling issued by a Sheikha or other authority to interpret doctrine in a specific matter.

lore.title: Ruling
lore.body: An authoritative decision that defines what is permitted, required, or forbidden.

lore.title: Law
lore.body: A binding rule derived from doctrine and enforced by authority.

lore.title: Permission
lore.body: An authorized allowance granted by a higher authority.

lore.title: Prohibition
lore.body: A formal restriction imposed by doctrine or authority.

lore.title: Obligation
lore.body: A required act or state enforced by doctrine.

lore.title: Correctional Rite
lore.body: A ritual performed to enforce alignment and remove deviation.

lore.title: Submission State
lore.body: A condition in which an individual fully yields to authority.

lore.title: Sealing
lore.body: The act of restricting, finalizing, or formally defining a state or function.

lore.title: Opening
lore.body: The act of permitting access, function, or transformation.

lore.title: Transformation
lore.body: A change in state, role, or condition through doctrine or ritual.

lore.title: Reconditioning
lore.body: The repeated process of enforcing behavioral or physical alignment.

lore.title: Sanctified Space
lore.body: A location formally designated for ritual or doctrinal activity.

lore.title: Zone of Control
lore.body: An area where a specific authority exercises direct influence.

lore.title: Inner Chamber
lore.body: A restricted space reserved for high-level rituals or authority actions.

lore.title: Lineage
lore.body: A structured chain of authority, origin, or transmission.

lore.title: Possession
lore.body: A state in which authority is fully exercised over a body or subject.

lore.title: Lactation
lore.body: The process through which milk is produced and made available.

lore.title: Ingestion
lore.body: The act of consuming a substance within a ritual or functional context.

lore.title: Transmission
lore.body: The transfer of state, meaning, or influence through substance or act.

lore.title: Assessment
lore.body: The evaluation of a subject’s state, alignment, or function.

lore.title: Measurement
lore.body: The act of quantifying attributes, states, or traces.

lore.title: Record of State
lore.body: A documented account of an individual’s condition or status.

lore.title: Embodiment
lore.body: The state of fully expressing a defined function or doctrine through the body.

lore.title: Reduction
lore.body: The process of limiting a subject to a specific function or role.

lore.title: Expansion
lore.body: The increase or broadening of function, influence, or authority.

lore.title: Containment
lore.body: The act of restricting movement, function, or influence within defined limits.

lore.title: Matron
lore.body: A woman who holds recognized authority within a defined domain, below the rank of Matriarch.

lore.title: Halāl
lore.body: That which is permitted and aligned with doctrine.

lore.title: Harām
lore.body: That which is forbidden and constitutes deviation from doctrine.

lore.title: Exposure
lore.body: The act or state of making the body or function visible under doctrinal conditions.

lore.title: Pact
lore.body: A formalized agreement binding individuals under shared roles, functions, or doctrine.

lore.title: Fertility
lore.body: The capacity to generate, sustain, or enable creation within the system.

lore.title: Divine
lore.body: That which is recognized as absolute, originating beyond human authority, and reflected through doctrine.

lore.title: Axis
lore.body: A central line or principle around which a system, body, or doctrine is organized.

lore.title: Geometry
lore.body: The structured arrangement of bodies, functions, or relationships according to defined principles.

lore.title: Allah
lore.body: The absolute divine authority recognized as the ultimate source of existence and doctrine.

lore.title: Qur’an
lore.body: The primary revealed text containing foundational guidance and authority.

lore.title: Ayah
lore.body: A discrete unit of revelation within the Qur’an.

lore.title: Concealment
lore.body: The act of restricting visibility or access according to doctrine.

lore.title: Revelation
lore.body: The controlled unveiling of a body, truth, or function.

lore.title: Union
lore.body: A state in which multiple entities function as a single structured system.

lore.title: Bond
lore.body: A sustained connection defined by authority, function, or ritual.

lore.title: Center
lore.body: The focal point of authority, function, or structure.

lore.title: Hierarchy
lore.body: An ordered system of ranked authority and roles.

lore.title: Structure
lore.body: An organized arrangement of elements governed by defined relationships.

lore.title: Interpretation
lore.body: The act of deriving meaning from doctrine, text, or event.

lore.title: Authority of Interpretation
lore.body: The recognized right to define meaning within doctrine.

lore.title: Canonical Meaning
lore.body: The officially accepted interpretation of a term, text, or concept.

lore.title: Framework
lore.body: The underlying system that defines how all elements interact.

lore.title: Constraint
lore.body: A limitation imposed to maintain structure or order.

lore.title: Collapse
lore.body: The breakdown of structure, function, or alignment.

lore.title: Hadith
lore.body: A recorded statement, action, or approval attributed to a recognized authority and used as a source of guidance.

lore.title: Chain of Transmission
lore.body: A documented sequence of individuals through whom a statement or ruling has been passed.

lore.title: Authenticity
lore.body: The degree to which a transmitted statement is verified and accepted as valid.

lore.title: Daughter
lore.body: A female individual defined in relation to maternal authority and lineage.

lore.title: Motherhood
lore.body: The state of embodying the role, authority, and function of a Mother.

lore.title: Offspring
lore.body: An individual produced through recognized processes of lineage and creation.

lore.title: Lineal Authority
lore.body: Authority derived directly through lineage.

lore.title: Marriage
lore.body: A formally recognized union that defines roles, authority, and permitted interaction between individuals.

lore.title: Contract of Union
lore.body: A binding agreement that establishes the conditions of a marriage or pact.

lore.title: Husband
lore.body: A male individual assigned a defined role within a marriage under doctrinal structure.

lore.title: Wife
lore.body: A female individual holding a defined role within a marriage, typically aligned with authority.

lore.title: Consort
lore.body: A partner associated with an authority figure without necessarily holding equal rank.

lore.title: Safety
lore.body: A state in which a subject is protected and maintained within controlled conditions.

lore.title: Protection
lore.body: The act of preserving a subject from harm or deviation.

lore.title: Stability
lore.body: A sustained condition of order, balance, and controlled function.

lore.title: Security
lore.body: The enforcement of conditions that prevent disruption or deviation.

lore.title: Pleasure
lore.body: A controlled positive sensation permitted or regulated within doctrine.

lore.title: Gratification
lore.body: The fulfillment of a permitted desire within defined limits.

lore.title: Indulgence
lore.body: The act of exceeding controlled limits of pleasure.

lore.title: Restraint of Pleasure
lore.body: The limitation or regulation of pleasurable experience.

lore.title: Devotion
lore.body: A sustained state of loyalty and attachment to authority or doctrine.

lore.title: Attachment
lore.body: An emotional or functional bond between individuals.

lore.title: Detachment
lore.body: The removal or absence of emotional or functional connection.

lore.title: Role
lore.body: A defined set of behaviors and functions assigned to an individual.

lore.title: Status
lore.body: A recognized position within the hierarchy.

lore.title: Recognition
lore.body: The formal acknowledgment of a role, state, or authority.

lore.title: Validation
lore.body: The act of confirming correctness or legitimacy.

lore.title: Limit
lore.body: A defined boundary that must not be exceeded.

lore.title: Threshold of Permissibility
lore.body: The point at which an act transitions from permitted to forbidden.

lore.title: Excess
lore.body: The act of surpassing defined limits.

lore.title: Dependence
lore.body: A state in which a subject relies on authority for function or stability.

lore.title: Authority Bond
lore.body: A relationship defined primarily by control and hierarchy.

lore.title: Mutual Function
lore.body: A structured relationship where each participant fulfills a defined role.
